metadata.description: Claude Code skills built to AMPLIFY genuine voice, not generate fake voice. Anchored by SOUL, a personalized voice primitive populated interactively from your own writing samples or an interview. Composes with whisper-flow (raw dictation input), platform-hat-deriver (auto-derived platform hats), and deslop (universal AI-tell catcher).

plugins.name: everything
plugins.description: Install all six skills plus /welcome and /diagnose commands: deslop, soul, platform-hat-deriver, whisper-flow, voice-hat-template, platform-hat-template. After install run /welcome to see next steps. SOUL ships unpopulated and self-onboards via /soul. Use /diagnose any time to health-check installed soul-skills.

plugins.name: deslop
plugins.description: Universal pass for catching AI-generated tells in any text draft before publishing. Catches structural rhythm uniformity, AI-flavored vocabulary, copula avoidance, template phrases, and tone red flags.

plugins.name: platform-hat-deriver
plugins.description: Meta-skill that auto-generates platform-specific writing hats from a populated SOUL plus a platform name. REQUIRES SOUL to be populated first; if not, routes user to /soul. Built-in syntax reference for LinkedIn, Reddit, Slack, Twitter/X, Discord, GitHub, Substack, email. Asks 9 personal questions covering failure modes, tone overlay, target channels, hard limits, post structure, hook formulas, samples, AI detection signals, community quirks.

plugins.name: platform-hat-template
plugins.description: Manual escape-hatch template for platform-specific writing rules. Most users should prefer platform-hat-deriver for automatic generation from SOUL.

plugins.name: soul
plugins.description: Personalized voice primitive. Self-onboarding: ships with a STATE CHECK that auto-triggers the interactive onboarding (sample / interview / hybrid mode) the first time the skill loads. Encodes the user's perceptual filters (NOTICE), values (VALUE), identity (WHO), current focus, thinking patterns, and expression non-negotiables. Just say 'set up my SOUL' or '/soul' after install. Ships with /welcome and /diagnose commands.

plugins.name: voice-hat-template
plugins.description: Manual escape-hatch template for users who want to write their own voice rules without the SOUL interactive onboarding.

plugins.name: whisper-flow
plugins.description: Input pipeline for raw voice-to-text dictation (Wispr Flow, macOS Dictation, Whisper). Identifies ideas, strips fillers, restructures cadence, preserves all user ideas, then applies soul + platform hat, then copies to clipboard. Composes with soul and platform hats; deslop runs as a final pass.
